title: Associate Software Engineer
text: Developed REST APIs in Python to improve content delivery for an application with 1B+ downloads and 70M monthly active users. Optimized reliability and performance, achieving 99.8% uptime, p95 latency under 200–300ms, and 2,500 requests per minute per Kubernetes pod.

title: Software Engineer - Independent Contractor
text: Built a Configure, Price, Quote (CPQ) system with SQL Server and Infor SyteLine to accelerate sales. Customized ERP system processes in Infor SyteLine to streamline manufacturing operations.

title: Software Engineering Intern in Test Engineering
text: Engineered a new automated machine vision lens focusing procedure that is 3x faster, projected to save over 600 focusing hours annually on the production floor using C# and Python. Enhanced consistency and precision of lens focusing by utilizing Modulation Transfer Function for quantifiable focus scoring.

title: Full Stack Software Engineering Intern
text: Developed the full stack of a cross-platform application using C#, MAUI, and SQL Server. Collaborated with the development team to troubleshoot and resolve technical issues, ensuring smooth functionality and meeting project objectives.

title: Front End Software Engineering Intern
text: Established customer-facing React apps with JavaScript and TypeScript, facilitating the review and adjustment of licenses, payments, and settings. Segmented a large codebase into modular components to adhere to clean architecture principles, improving maintainability and scalability. Implemented GitHub Workflows to fully automate versioning, packaging, and publishing to private NuGet Package.
